summary: Reviewed Buddhavamsa A-line intake prerequisites. Confirmed 208 raw source markdown files exist, but documents registry is empty and per-document status files are missing. Selected the first production-ready subset as gcb-src-001 through gcb-src-004 once registry and source_ready statuses are created.

issues.detail: data/documents.json contains an empty documents array, so no doc_id is registered for A-line preflight.
data/status/ contains no per-document status JSON files, so no document is provably in source_ready.
A01 requires a registered doc_id and current_status of not_started or source_ready. Those prerequisites are missing for every raw file.

next_recommended_action: Register gcb-src-001, gcb-src-002, gcb-src-003, and gcb-src-004 in data/documents.json and create matching data/status/{doc_id}.json files at source_ready before delegating A01.
